Ukraine's military launched a drone attack on Russia's Tula Oblast overnight on June 26, reportedly striking a chemical plant as well as energy infrastructure in the region, Russian Telegram media channels reported.

description: Russia launches fresh ballistic missile attack against Kyiv. At least two people in the capital have been injured and a fire broke out in the Darnytskyi district, Kyiv Mayor Vitali Klitschko reported. Explosions have also been heard in Kremenchuk, Poltava Oblast, during Russia's attack. Photo: Ukraine's State Emergency Service / Telegram

description: Russia's 4th-largest oil refinery shuts down after Ukrainian drone strike. The Lukoil-Nizhegorodorgsintez refinery in Kstovo, Nizhny Novgorod Oblast, is Russia's fourth-largest oil refinery and second-largest producer of gasoline. The facility went offline on June 24 after a drone strike, two industry sources told Reuters.
description_en: Russia's 4th-largest oil refinery shuts down after Ukrainian drone strike. The Lukoil-Nizhegorodorgsintez refinery in Kstovo, Nizhny Novgorod Oblast, is Russia's fourth-largest oil refinery and second-largest producer of gasoline. The facility went offline on June 24 after a drone strike, two industry sources told Reuters.

description: The largest refinery "Lukoil" stopped after the attack of drones, - Reuters The agency reports with reference to two sources in the industry that NORSY in the Nizhny Novgorod region stopped oil processing after the attack of Ukrainian UAVs. This is the fourth refinery in Russia in terms of capacity and the second in terms of gasoline production. After the attack, the primary processing plant, which provides about a quarter of the power, was damaged there...
description_en: The largest refinery "Lukoil" stopped after the attack of drones, - Reuters The agency reports with reference to two sources in the industry that NORSY in the Nizhny Novgorod region stopped oil processing after the attack of Ukrainian UAVs. After the attack, the primary processing plant, which provides about a quarter of the power, was damaged there...
description_uk: Крупнейший НПЗ "Лукойла" остановился после атаки дронов, - Reuters Агентство со ссылкой на два источника в отрасли сообщает, что НОРСИ в Нижегородской области остановил переработку нефти после удара украинских БПЛА. Это четвертый по мощности НПЗ в россии и второй по производству бензина. После атаки там повреждена установка первичной переработки, которая обеспечивает около четверти мощности...

description: Report of the Minister of Internal Affairs Ihor Klymenko. I am grateful for the prompt work to eliminate the consequences of the Russian attack on the Lavra. Conservation work on the Assumption Cathedral, which was the most damaged by Russian drones, has already been completed. The roof of the cathedral is covered so that the condition of the building does not deteriorate due to weather conditions. We are preparing to restore the cathedral, and this is already the responsibility, in particular, of the Ministry...
description_en: Report of the Minister of Internal Affairs Ihor Klymenko. I am grateful for the prompt work to eliminate the consequences of the Russian attack on the Lavra. Conservation work on the Assumption Cathedral, which was the most damaged by Russian drones, has already been completed. The roof of the cathedral is covered so that the condition of the building does not deteriorate due to weather conditions. We are preparing to restore the cathedral, and this is already the responsibility, in particular, of the Ministry...
description_uk: Доповідь міністра внутрішніх справ Ігоря Клименка. Вдячний за оперативну роботу з ліквідацією наслідків російського удару по Лаврі. Вже завершені роботи по консервації Успенського собору, який був найбільше пошкоджений російськими дронами. Дах собору перекритий, щоб стан будівлі не погіршився через погодні умови. Готуємо відновлення собору, і це вже відповідальність, зокрема, Міністерства...

description: Our long-range operations are consistent, accurate responses to Russia's protracted war and strikes on Ukrainian cities and communities. Tonight, units of the Defense Forces hit the "Poltavska" oil depot in the Krasnodar region. The distance to the target is about 300 kilometers from the front line. In the morning, the SBU hit two refineries in Ufa - "Bashneft-Ufaneftekhim" and "Bashneft-Novoil". It is 1500 kilometers from...

description_uk: Наші далекобійні операції – це послідовні точні відповіді на затягування Росією війни та удари по українських містах і громадах. Сьогодні вночі підрозділи Сил оборони уразили нафтобазу «Полтавська» у Краснодарському регіоні. Відстань до цілі – близько 300 кілометрів від лінії фронту. Вранці було влучання СБУ по двох НПЗ в Уфі – «Башнефть-Уфанефтехим» і «Башнефть-Новойл». Це 1500 кілометрів від...
